projects.title: Alternator from Apex Legends
projects.description: Designed, modeled and printed a life-sized prop replica of the Alternator from Respawn Entertainment's Apex Legends, with all components carefully engineered and optimized for 3D print production.

projects.title: Armrest Latch Honda Civic 2010
projects.description: Reverse engineered and redesigned a center console latch for a 2010 Honda Civic accurately deconstructing the original component's geometry and mechanical behavior to produce a precise, fully functional replacement part from scratch.

projects.title: Bowl Filler
projects.description: Engineered a precision bowl filler solution from exact measurements, purpose-built to maximize filling accuracy while minimizing mess and cleanup transforming a tedious, imprecise process into a clean and efficient one.

projects.title: CAD Designed and 3D Printed Guitar
projects.description: Designed, engineered, and 3D printed a fully functional, to-scale guitar from the ground up spanning multi-part modeling, structural engineering, and final assembly. The project reached approximately 700,000 views on social media, demonstrating both technical execution and broad public appeal.

images.alt: CAD Designed and 3D Printed Guitar image 1
CAD Designed and 3D Printed Guitar image 2

projects.title: Clip Pilots Video Auto Clipper
projects.description: Engineered an automated video clipping system capable of processing large-scale content libraries, leveraging a proprietary AI model, designed and trained from the ground up to detect and extract clips optimized for viewer engagement.

images.alt: Clip Pilots Video Auto Clipper image 1

projects.title: Cup of Noodles Holder
projects.description: Designed and 3D modeled a custom Cup Noodles holder that enables mug-style gripping for safer, more comfortable handling while the contents are hot.

projects.id: Faceplate for Security Camera for Electrical Box
projects.title: Faceplate for Security Camera for Electrical Box
projects.description: Designed and 3D printed a precisely modeled custom faceplate for a security camera installation, engineered to fit and mount cleanly onto an electrical box enclosure.

projects.id: Fallout 4 Pipe Pistol with Moving Parts
projects.title: Fallout 4 Pipe Pistol with Moving Parts
projects.description: Designed, modeled, and 3D printed a life-sized replica of the Pipe Pistol from Bethesda's Fallout 4, engineering a functional moving trigger mechanism into the build merging accurate prop recreation with tangible mechanical detail.

images.alt: Fallout 4 Pipe Pistol with Moving Parts image 1
Fallout 4 Pipe Pistol with Moving Parts image 2

projects.title: Flatline from Apex Legends
projects.description: Designed and modeled a life-sized prop replica of the Flatline from Respawn Entertainment's Apex Legends, with all components carefully engineered and optimized for 3D print production.

projects.title: Glow Canister for Shortfilm
projects.description: Engineered and delivered a commissioned prop for a short film production, building a complete lighting system featuring RGB LEDs, hidden on-prop controls, and a custom-developed Android application with full Bluetooth connectivity enabling remote adjustment of brightness, colors, and animations. Delivered a professional-grade, production-ready prop that merges clean aesthetics with sophisticated electronics and a purpose-built mobile interface.

projects.id: Industrial Cup Holder Mount for Wall
projects.title: Industrial Cup Holder Mount for Wall
projects.description: Designed a robust, wall-mounted cup holder built to handle heavy-duty use, providing a secure and easily accessible storage solution for high-traffic environments.

images.alt: Industrial Cup Holder Mount for Wall image 1
Industrial Cup Holder Mount for Wall image 2

projects.title: Joint Filler and Packer
projects.description: Engineered a custom Joint Filler and Packer Tool from concept to final model, streamlining the filling process to maximize efficiency and ease of use.

projects.title: Legendary Hornet from Borderlands 2
projects.description: Engineered, modeled, and 3D printed a life-sized replica of the legendary Hornet from the Borderlands series, incorporating a fully functional spring-powered, trigger-activated cocking mechanism with internal moving parts demonstrating a deep integration of mechanical engineering and prop design.

projects.title: Lighter Clipper for BIC Lighters
projects.description: Engineered a precision-fit, multi-use attachment for BIC lighters, designed to exact tolerances for a secure fit while extending the lighter's functionality across packing and various practical applications.

images.alt: Lighter Clipper for BIC Lighters image 1
Lighter Clipper for BIC Lighters image 2

projects.title: Lilith the Portable AI Companion
projects.description: Conceived and built a portable, handheld AI assistant entirely from scratch, encompassing hardware design, PCB soldering, firmware development, UI graphics, and backend server infrastructure. Powered by an ESP32 microcontroller with haptic feedback, scroll wheel navigation, local storage, and real-time voice transcription via custom-built servers.

images.alt: Lilith the Portable AI Companion video 1

projects.id: Mars Attacks Laser Blaster Prop Replica
projects.title: Mars Attacks Laser Blaster Prop Replica
projects.description: Produced a life-sized prop replica of the iconic Martian Laser Rifle from Mars Attacks!, carefully modeled and 3D printed with close attention to the weapon's distinctive retro-sci-fi aesthetic and proportional accuracy.

images.alt: Mars Attacks Laser Blaster Prop Replica image 1

projects.title: Paint Mixer and Maker
projects.description: Designed, engineered, and programmed a fully automated paint mixing system capable of matching any RGB or CMYK color input with precision. The machine autonomously meters and combines dry pigments to achieve the target color, then dispenses a liquid binder via an integrated pump delivering a ready-to-use paint from raw materials with minimal user input. A complete end-to-end system spanning mechanical design, electronics, and software. Patent Pending

projects.title: Plastic Wrap Crate Opener Tool
projects.description: Designed and engineered a portable, keychain-integrated plastic cover slicer built to safely cut through heavy-duty crate wrapping reducing product access time while prioritizing user safety and everyday portability. A focused, practical solution that distills a workplace pain point into a minimal, carry-anywhere tool.

projects.title: R99 from Apex Legends
projects.description: Designed, modeled and printed a life-sized prop replica of the R-99 Carbine from Respawn Entertainment's Apex Legends, with all components carefully engineered and optimized for 3D print production.

projects.title: RE45 from Apex Legends
projects.description: Engineered a life-sized, multi-component prop replica of the RE-45 pistol from Respawn Entertainment's Apex Legends, with deliberate attention to scale accuracy and functional detail including a fully detachable magazine system secured through embedded magnet connections.

projects.id: Sally from COD Zombies PAP Replica
projects.title: Sally from COD Zombies PAP Replica
projects.description: Designed, modeled, and 3D printed a fully interactive life-sized prop replica of the Pack-a-Punched Sally from Call of Duty Zombies, engineering a complete electronics suite from the ground up encompassing a battery-powered microcontroller, RGB color-changing LEDs, trigger-activated button mechanics, integrated speakers, and hidden easter eggs. Developed a companion Wi-Fi application enabling users to upload custom sounds and define their own easter egg interactions, elevating the prop from a static replica into a fully programmable, user-customizable interactive experience.

projects.description: Designed and 3D printed custom spool feet enabling filament spools to stand upright for compact, organized storage.
